[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000001 1
1 01111011 6
2 11000110 4
3 11100111 6
4 11001000 3
5 10001001 3
6 10010001 3
7 11011101 6

34 10111110 6

56 10110011 5
67 00100011 3
70 10000101 3
